title: Candace Owens Claims 'Federal Conspiracy' in Kirk Assassination
headlines: Candace Owens Claims 'Federal Conspiracy' in Kirk Assassination
Candace Owens Slams Officials Over Kirk Murder Cover-Up
Candace Owens Demands Roommate's Alibi in Kirk Case
Candace Owens Casts a Dark Cloud Over Kirk's Killing
markdown_content:
*[Candace Owens speaking with attendees at the 2018 Student Action Summit hosted by Turning Point USA at the Palm Beach County Convention Center in West Palm Beach, Florida](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Candace_Owens_(44621880630).jpg). Photo courtesy of [Gage Skidmore](https://www.flickr.com/photos/gageskidmore/44621880630/) under [CC BY-SA 2.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/2.0/).*

Candace Owens has reignited controversy with explosive allegations surrounding the assassination of Charlie Kirk, the founder of Turning Point USA. In a series of posts and statements made in late 2025, Owens reportedly claimed that a "federal conspiracy" is obscuring the truth behind Kirk's death at a Utah event earlier that September. While she has suggested involvement by various parties, including Utah Governor Spencer Cox and federal authorities, her more sensational claims about foreign military aircraft, including Egyptian planes, remain unverified and unsupported by official investigations or credible sources.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/EvanAKilgore/status/1995995330383331602" />

### Owens' 'Federal Conspiracy' Allegation

Owens' narrative focuses on the belief that the official story of Kirk's assassination is a carefully constructed cover-up. She argues that federal authorities and Governor Cox moved quickly to protect Tyler Robinson's roommate, Lance Twiggs, whose alibi she demands be made public. Owens criticized Cox's public statement declaring "we got him" as misleading, suggesting it was intended to distract from deeper, hidden truths, as reported by Mediaite.

Her Instagram posts reportedly outline a timeline that she says contradicts the official account and points to a broader conspiracy involving insiders within TPUSA and government agencies. Owens insists the public deserves transparency about Twiggs' role and whereabouts, framing her claims as a call for accountability amid what she calls a "federal conspiracy," as reported by Mediaite. These remain allegations without official confirmation.

### Unsubstantiated Claims of Foreign Military Involvement

Among the more dramatic elements of Owens' theory are her unverified suggestions that foreign military aircraft, including Egyptian planes, were somehow connected to the events surrounding Kirk's death. These claims have not appeared in any official reports or credible news sources and remain entirely speculative. No evidence has been presented to support the involvement of foreign military forces or aircraft in the assassination, and the official investigation has neither confirmed nor denied such claims.

Given the lack of corroboration, these allegations should be viewed as part of Owens' broader conspiracy theory rather than established fact. The official inquiry into Kirk's death is ongoing, and no credible information has emerged linking foreign military activity to the case.

### The Political Fallout and Debate Over Kirk's Views

Owens has also fueled debate by suggesting that Kirk had begun to soften his previously staunch pro-Israel stance in the months before his death. She claimed billionaire hedge fund manager Bill Ackman was "very upset" by Kirk's changing views and that "threats were made" against Kirk as a result, as reported by Mediaite. Ackman publicly denied these allegations, calling them absurd, and reportedly shared private text messages with Kirk to demonstrate their friendly relationship and disprove any claims of blackmail or threats.

This dispute highlights the charged atmosphere surrounding Kirk's death, with Owens' claims sparking backlash from other conservative figures. According to Mediaite, Tucker Carlson asserted that Kirk "did not like Benjamin Netanyahu" and that he "was appalled by what was happening in Gaza," a claim that Senator Ted Cruz strongly disputed, affirming Kirk's unwavering support for Israel and the Jewish community.

### A Story of Suspicion and Grief

Owens' allegations tap into a potent mix of grief, distrust, and political intrigue. The assassination of a high-profile conservative figure like Kirk has left many searching for answers, and Owens' narrative offers a dramatic explanation that challenges the official account. Her insistence on a federal conspiracy and calls for transparency resonate with those skeptical of government institutions and eager to uncover hidden truths.

However, it is crucial to distinguish between verified facts and unsubstantiated claims. Owens' theory about foreign military involvement remains unsupported by evidence, and the official investigation continues without confirmation of such connections. The public is left to navigate a complex web of allegations, denials, and political posturing as the search for truth unfolds.

### What Lies Ahead

As Owens continues to press for answers and transparency, the official investigation into Charlie Kirk's assassination remains active. Authorities have not confirmed any foreign involvement or conspiracy beyond the known facts surrounding Tyler Robinson's alleged role. The case remains a focal point of political tension and public fascination, with Owens' incendiary claims adding fuel to an already volatile mix.

title: Zac Brown Sparks Outrage With 'Satanic Ritual' Show in Vegas
headlines: Zac Brown Sparks Outrage With 'Satanic Ritual' Show in Vegas
Zac Brown Faces Backlash Over Hellish Sphere Show
Zac Brown's $6M Vegas Show Stuns Country Fans
'Satanic Ritual' Outcry Erupts at Sphere Show
markdown_content:
*[Zac Brown Band, Detroit, MI, 2010](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Zac_Brown_Band_Hoedown.jpg). Photo courtesy of David Lamarand under [CC BY-SA 3.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/).*

The first night of the Zac Brown Band's residency at the Las Vegas Sphere turned into a spectacle that left fans divided and social media ablaze. What was meant to be a groundbreaking country music concert quickly spiraled into a fiery controversy, with some attendees reportedly describing the show as a "satanic ritual" rather than a musical performance. The immersive visuals, featuring demons, tortured souls, and a crown resembling devil horns, shocked many who expected a traditional country experience. Meanwhile, others defended the show as a bold, creative retelling of lead singer Zac Brown's personal journey, pushing the boundaries of concert storytelling.

The Zac Brown Band's Sphere residency, launched in early December 2025, was billed as a dream come true for the band and a unique opportunity to blend music with cutting-edge immersive technology. The Sphere, known for its massive 360-degree LED screen and haptic seat technology, offers artists a canvas unlike any other. Previous acts like U2 and the Backstreet Boys have used the venue to create unforgettable experiences, but Zac Brown's show took things to a new level, combining his band's two-decade catalog with a deeply personal narrative and striking, sometimes unsettling visuals.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/LasVegasLocally/status/1997734917216825829" />

### A Descent Into Darkness

From the moment Zac Brown took the stage on opening night, the tone was set for a concert unlike any other. The show opened with a dramatic descent into what many reportedly described as a hellish landscape. Giant projections of flames engulfed the Sphere's vast LED screen, while a towering skeleton adorned with a crown that resembled devil horns loomed ominously. Brown himself wore a large silver bone crown during this segment, intensifying the dark theatricality of the performance.

This imagery, paired with the band's performance of "Heavy Is the Head" from their 2015 album "Jekyll & Hyde," sparked immediate backlash. Fans reportedly took to social media platforms like X and TikTok to express shock and moral outrage. According to mutliple reports, many accused the band of staging a satanic ritual, with some suggesting that the visuals were evidence of a hidden agenda within the entertainment industry. Comments ranged from disbelief that a country music concert could feature such dark themes to outright condemnation of what they saw as a celebration of evil.

### Social Media Erupts

The reaction online was swift and intense. According to Metro and International Business Times, some users described the show as a "demonic ritual" and accused Zac Brown of "selling his soul to the devil." Others warned that the entertainment industry was openly embracing satanic imagery, no longer hiding behind subtle symbolism. The controversy tapped into a broader cultural conversation about the presence of dark or occult themes in popular music and entertainment, with some viewers feeling betrayed by the stark contrast between Zac Brown's country roots and the hellish spectacle they witnessed.

Yet, not all reactions were negative. Many fans praised the show's immersive quality and creative ambition. Some described the concert as "incredible" and "unforgettable," applauding the band for pushing artistic boundaries and delivering a multisensory experience that went beyond a typical live performance, as reported by Metro. The Sphere's technology allowed the band to weave a narrative that included soaring highs and terrifying lows, reflecting the emotional complexity of Zac Brown's life story and the themes of his latest album, "Love & Fear."

### Zac Brown's Vision

Zac Brown has defended the show as a deeply personal journey rather than a satanic spectacle. "Bringing our new album 'Love & Fear' to Sphere Las Vegas is a dream come true. It's my masterpiece so far. This show is the story of my life that I have never shared, a journey through my imagination, music, and stories that have defined who I am," Brown wrote on Instagram, as reported by WhiskeyRiff. Brown explained that the show explores the duality of human experience, focusing on the themes of love and fear that shape our decisions and emotions. The dark visuals are intended to represent the struggles and storms we all face, not an endorsement of evil or occult practices.

The production blends innovative visuals, seat-haptic technology, and musical storytelling to create an experience where fans don't just watch the show — they become part of it. Brown's ambition is to join the ranks of legendary acts who have transformed live music into a lifelong journey for their fans. The residency reportedly cost millions, with Brown telling US Weekly he's going into debt to realize this vision, as reported by WhiskeyRiff. Rumors suggest the total cost could be between $6 million and $8 million, though this figure remains unconfirmed.

### The Clash of Expectations

The controversy highlights a fascinating clash between traditional country music expectations and modern concert theatrics. Zac Brown's fanbase, known for its loyalty and appreciation of heartfelt storytelling, was confronted with a show that challenged their perceptions. The juxtaposition of country music with dark, hellish imagery created a jarring experience for some, while others embraced the bold artistic statement.

This tension reflects a broader trend in entertainment where genres and styles blend, and artists use technology to craft immersive narratives that provoke strong emotional reactions. Whether viewed as a shocking spectacle or a creative triumph, the Zac Brown Band's Sphere residency has undeniably sparked conversation and debate about the future of live music experiences.

### A Tribute Amid the Fire

Despite the dark themes, the show also includes moments of warmth and tribute. One highlight reportedly praised by fans was a touching salute to the military during the performance of "Chicken Fried," showcasing the band's ability to balance intensity with heartfelt connection. This contrast adds complexity to the show, reminding audiences that the residency is not a one-note spectacle but a layered emotional journey.

### What's Next for the Residency?

With several more shows scheduled at the Sphere, the Zac Brown Band's residency promises to continue stirring strong reactions. Whether the controversy will grow or fade remains to be seen, but one thing is clear: Zac Brown has created a performance that will be talked about long after the final note. The mix of country music, cutting-edge technology, and provocative imagery has set a new standard for immersive concerts-and ignited a fiery debate about art, faith, and entertainment in the modern age.

__References:__ [Zac Brown Accused of Staging 'Hell-Themed Ritual' at Sphere as Fans Spot Demons and Devil Horns](https://www.ibtimes.co.uk/zac-brown-accused-staging-hell-themed-ritual-sphere-fans-spot-demons-devil-horns-1760929) | [Zac Brown Band Under Fire For "Satanic" Imagery During Las Vegas Sphere Show](https://www.whiskeyriff.com/2025/12/06/zac-brown-band-under-fire-for-satanic-imagery-during-las-vegas-sphere-show/) | [Music star terrifies fans with 'satanic ritual' during concert](https://metro.co.uk/2025/12/09/music-star-terrifies-fans-satanic-ritual-concert-25309389)

title: Pamela Anderson Goes Makeup-Free
headlines: Pamela Anderson Goes Makeup-Free
Pamela Anderson's Bold New Look
Pamela Anderson Shakes Up Hollywood
Pamela Anderson Shocks With No Makeup
markdown_content:
*[Pamela Anderson in 2025](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Pamela_Anderson_2025_(cropped).jpg). Photo shared under [CC BY 2.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/2.0/).*

Pamela Anderson stunned the world when she appeared makeup-free at Paris Fashion Week in 2023, a bold move that marked a dramatic departure from the bombshell image that made her a '90s icon. This wasn't just a fashion statement. It was a deeply personal rebirth, a shedding of layers that had long defined her public persona. For Anderson, going makeup-free was about reclaiming her true self and inspiring a new generation of women to embrace their natural beauty without fear or apology.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/alphafox/status/1863984038278496630" />

### From Blonde Bombshell to Barefaced Icon

Pamela Anderson's rise to fame was inseparable from her signature look: platinum blonde hair, overdrawn lips, and heavy eye makeup. The "Baywatch" star's image was a cultural phenomenon, embodying the ultimate '90s sex symbol. But beneath the glitz and glamour, Anderson harbored a desire to be seen for who she really was, not just the persona crafted by Hollywood and media.

Her decision to stop wearing makeup was part of a larger journey of self-discovery and peeling back the layers that had long defined her public image. Anderson explains that the inspiration came from the young women in her life — her sons' girlfriends and nieces — whom she wanted to encourage to feel confident in their own skin. "I just want to make sure that they feel confident in who they are...and to not worry so much," she said, as reported by The Looker. This transformation was about more than appearance; it was about embracing authenticity and encouraging others to do the same.

### A Moment That Changed Everything

When Anderson first showed up at Paris Fashion Week without makeup, didn't expect much attention, saying, "I remember thinking, 'Nobody's even going to notice' — and people noticed," as reported by The Looker. The reaction was electric. Fashion insiders praising her for the courage to embrace authenticity, including former French Vogue editor Carine Roitfeld who reportedly told Anderson, "I like what you're doing," according to PEOPLE. This public embrace of her natural self was a revelation for many who had only known Anderson as the heavily made-up blonde bombshell.

This moment was more than a personal milestone. It was a cultural statement in an industry obsessed with perfection and youth. Anderson's barefaced appearance challenged conventional beauty standards and sparked conversations about self-acceptance and the pressures women face to conform. She wanted to be a role model, showing that beauty does not require a mask and that confidence comes from within.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/people/status/1998765676115182015" />

### Reconnecting With Herself and Her Past

Despite the radical change, Anderson does not reject her past. She acknowledges the vulnerability and humanity that defined her early roles, including the iconic "Baywatch" years. Yet, she refers to that era as "the ancient past" and insists that the girl who once embodied that image is gone, as reported by PEOPLE. This reinvention is not about erasing history but about evolving beyond it.

Her recent roles reflect this evolution. Anderson has taken on more nuanced characters, such as the gray-haired matriarch in the upcoming drama "Rosebush Pruning," a remake of the 1965 Italian film "Fists in the Pocket." This role, along with her acclaimed performance in the summer hit "The Naked Gun" remake and her stage work in Tennessee Williams' "Camino Real," signals a new chapter in her career-one defined by depth, maturity, and creative freedom.

### A New Look, A New Freedom

Anderson's transformation extends beyond makeup. She recently debuted a striking red hair color for her role in the Michael Cera-directed comedy "Love Is Not the Answer." Though she admits she is still adjusting to the change, she embraces the freedom to experiment with her appearance on her own terms. "I'll be blonde in no time or maybe a different color," she said, as reported by PEOPLE, underscoring her playful approach to reinvention.

This freedom is emblematic of Anderson's broader journey toward self-empowerment. She is no longer defined by the expectations of others but by her own choices. Her recent ventures, including co-owning the beauty brand Sonsie Skin with her sons, reflect her commitment to authenticity and self-care. Anderson's message is clear: beauty is about confidence, not conformity.

### Inspiring a New Generation

Perhaps the most compelling aspect of Anderson's makeup-free journey is her desire to inspire younger women. She wants them to feel comfortable in their own skin and to reject the pressure to hide behind cosmetics or societal standards. Anderson's openness about her transformation has resonated with many, with fans and strangers alike thanking her for setting an example of courage and self-love.

Her influence extends beyond the red carpet and film sets. Through her weekly Substack, "The Open Journal," Anderson shares her thoughts on self-discovery and personal growth, inviting readers into her ongoing journey. She has become a beacon for those seeking to embrace their true selves in a world that often demands masks and facades.

### A Life Reclaimed

At 58, Pamela Anderson is rewriting her story. She is no longer just the blonde bombshell who captivated millions in the '90s. She is a woman who has faced loss, embraced change, and emerged stronger and more authentic. Her decision to go makeup-free is not just about appearance; it is a declaration of independence and self-respect.

Anderson's journey reminds us that reinvention is possible at any age and that true beauty shines brightest when it is unfiltered. As she continues to take on new roles, launch new projects, and inspire others, one thing is certain: Pamela Anderson has finally found herself — and she is glowing.

__References:__ [Pamela Anderson Reveals Why She Stopped Wearing Makeup](https://www.thedailybeast.com/pamela-anderson-reveals-why-she-went-makeup-free/) | [Pamela Anderson on Her Year of 'Happy Surprises' in Movies, Romance and So Much More](https://people.com/pamela-anderson-people-cover-career-romance-hair-surprises-11864075)

title: Jenna Bush Hager Reveals New 'Today' Host
headlines: Jenna Bush Hager Reveals New 'Today' Host
Jenna Bush Hager Calls New Host Her 'Forever Friend'
Sheinelle Jones' Journey From Grief to 'Today' Show Spotlight
'Today' Show Shocks Fans With New Host
markdown_content:
*[Jenna Bush Hager, 2016](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Jenna_Bush_Hager_(40343848434).jpg). Photo courtesy of Moody College of Communication under [CC BY-SA 2.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/2.0/).*

Sheinelle Jones was officially named the permanent co-host of the 10 a.m. hour of the "Today" show on December 9, 2025, marking a heartfelt new chapter for the beloved NBC morning franchise. Starting January 12, Jones will join Jenna Bush Hager as co-host of the newly rebranded "Today with Jenna & Sheinelle," ending nearly a year of rotating guest hosts following Hoda Kotb's departure earlier in the year.

This announcement is more than just a programming update. It signals a moment of renewal and emotional resonance for viewers who have come to know Jones as a familiar, comforting presence. A seasoned journalist with NBC since 2014, Jones brings a rare blend of resilience, warmth, and authenticity to the screen — qualities that have only deepened after her personal journey through loss and healing. Now, as she steps into this permanent role, audiences can expect to see her guiding them through the morning with a spirit shaped by both professional excellence and profound human experience.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/TODAYshow/status/1998404700920496620" />

### A New Era With a Forever Friend

Jenna Bush Hager's announcement was filled with emotion and gratitude. She described Jones as her "forever friend" and expressed excitement about embarking on this new journey together, as reported by PEOPLE. Their chemistry, already evident during Jones's guest hosting stints, promises to bring a fresh yet familiar energy to the show. Bush Hager's heartfelt words underscored the deep bond they share, a connection that viewers will now witness every weekday morning.

The fourth hour of "Today" had been in a state of flux since Kotb's exit in January 2025. The show was temporarily renamed "Today with Jenna & Friends," featuring a rotating cast of guest hosts ranging from Hollywood stars to NBC colleagues. Jones herself was among these guest hosts, stepping in with grace and poise just weeks after returning to work following the death of her husband, Uche Ojeh, from an aggressive brain cancer.

### Weathering Loss With Strength and Authenticity

Jones's journey has been one of courage and vulnerability. After her husband's passing in May 2025, she took a leave of absence to care for him and grieve. Her return to the "Today" show in September was marked by an emotional conversation with Savannah Guthrie, where Jones shared how she was fighting for joy despite the pain, adding, "So just as healing as it is for me and fun, I hope we can bring that for people at home," as reported by PEOPLE. Jones's openness about her grief and resilience has resonated deeply with viewers, making her not just a trusted journalist but a source of inspiration.

Her role as a mother to three children — Kayin, 16, and twins Clara and Uche, 13 — adds another layer to her relatable on-air persona. Jones has spoken candidly about the challenges of navigating life after loss, describing the "new normal" she faces, as reported by Entertainment Weekly. Jenna Bush Hager has publicly praised Jones's strength, reportedly calling her one of the strongest people she has ever met, a testament to the profound respect and affection between the two co-hosts.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/goodhousemag/status/1998773334805225964" />

### A Trusted Voice for a Hopeful Tomorrow

Jones's permanent appointment is a strategic and emotional win for "Today." As executive vice president Libby Leist and executive producer Talia Parkinson-Jones noted, the pairing of Jenna and Sheinelle marks an "exciting new chapter," as reported by Entertainment Weekly. Both women have grown within the ranks of "Today" and are beloved for their authenticity, warmth, and genuine connection with the audience. Their partnership promises to continue the show's tradition of blending news, friendship, and heartfelt moments in a way that feels both comforting and uplifting.

Jones's move from co-hosting the 9 a.m. hour alongside Al Roker, Craig Melvin, and Dylan Dreyer to the 10 a.m. hour with Bush Hager also signals a shift in the show's dynamic. The 9 a.m. hour will continue with its current hosts, while Jones will bring her unique voice and perspective to the later hour, which has historically been lighter and more conversational. This transition allows Jones to fully embrace a role that aligns with her strengths as a broadcaster who can balance empathy with engaging storytelling.

### The Power of Friendship on Morning TV

The story of "Today with Jenna & Sheinelle" is as much about friendship as it is about news. The show's roots trace back to the beloved duo of Kathie Lee Gifford and Hoda Kotb, who set the tone for a morning program that celebrates connection and joy. Jenna Bush Hager has carried that legacy forward, and now with Jones by her side, the show is poised to continue that tradition with renewed energy and heart.

Jones herself has described the role as a "higher purpose," emphasizing the responsibility to bring joy, hope, and comfort to viewers, as reported by PEOPLE. Her presence on the show is a reminder that morning television can be a place of healing and inspiration, especially in times of personal and collective challenge.

### What Comes Next for Today's Fourth Hour?

As the new year begins, "Today with Jenna & Sheinelle" will offer viewers a blend of news, interviews, and lighthearted moments, anchored by two women whose friendship and professionalism shine through. The show's rebranding reflects a commitment to authenticity and emotional connection, qualities that Jones embodies fully.

__References:__ [Today' Show Announces New Permanent Co-Host Sheinelle Jones](https://www.thedailybeast.com/today-show-announces-new-permanent-co-host-sheinelle-jones/) | [Sheinelle Jones Announced as Jenna Bush Hager's Today Fourth Hour Co-Host After Hoda Kotb Exit](https://people.com/sheinelle-jones-announced-jenna-bush-hager-today-fourth-hour-co-host-11864810) | [Sheinelle Jones joins Jenna Bush Hager as permanent 'Today' host](https://ew.com/sheinelle-jones-joins-jenna-bush-hager-as-permanent-today-host-11865115)

title: Trump to Host UFC Fight Night at White House
headlines: Trump Vows 'Greatest Card Ever' for His 80th Birthday
markdown_content:
*[The former HP Pavillion in San Jose during a UFC event, 2013](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:The_Former_HP_Pavillion_In_San_Jose_During_a_UFC_event.jpg). Photo courtesy of Ron Hall under [CC BY 2.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/2.0/).*

Donald Trump is gearing up to transform the White House South Lawn into a jaw-dropping UFC arena for a fight night that promises to be unlike anything the nation has ever seen. Reportedly scheduled for June 14, 2026, the event will mark Trump's 80th birthday and coincide with America's 250th-anniversary celebrations, blending politics, spectacle, and sport in a way that could redefine public festivities at the nation's most iconic address.

This isn't just any fight card. UFC CEO Dana White, a longtime Trump ally and supporter, is reportedly holding back some of the biggest bouts in the company's history to make this event the greatest fight card ever assembled. Trump himself has boasted that the card will feature "eight or nine championship fights," as reported by Yahoo! Sports, more than doubling the UFC's record for title bouts on a single event.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/WestTillDeath/status/1997956057155653912" />

### A Spectacle Like No Other

Imagine a cage match set against the backdrop of the White House, with a temporary arena rising on the South Lawn to seat around 5,000 to 6,000 spectators. Beyond the arena, tens of thousands more will watch on giant screens set up on the National Mall's Ellipse, turning the heart of Washington, D.C., into a sprawling fight festival. The event will also reportedly feature weigh-ins on the steps of the Lincoln Memorial, autograph sessions, and even punching bags for tourists eager to test their skills.

The White House has reportedly released AI-generated images teasing the over-the-top nature of the event, hinting at laser and firework shows that will light up the night sky. Fighters may even warm up inside the White House itself, adding a surreal layer to the spectacle. This mash-up of politics and entertainment is a bold departure from traditional White House celebrations, blending the raw energy of UFC with the pomp of national pageantry.

### The Fight Card to End All Fight Cards

The UFC's 2026 White House card is shaping up to be a historic event. No UFC show in modern history has featured more than three title fights, making the prospect of "eight or nine" championship bouts staggering. With 12 belts in the promotion, the lineup will be packed with elite fighters, many of whom have publicly expressed their desire to participate.

Conor McGregor, the retired Irish fighter and vocal MAGA supporter, has already reportedly confirmed his spot on the card. His coach has revealed that training for the event is underway, with McGregor likely to face off against Michael Chandler, as reported by Yahoo! Sports. UFC light heavyweight champion Alex Pereira and welterweight champion Islam Makhachev, currently ranked as the sport's pound-for-pound best, are also among the big names expected to compete.

Jon Jones, often hailed as one of the greatest UFC fighters ever, has reportedly lobbied hard for a spot but appears unlikely to be included. Dana White has publicly expressed trust issues with Jones, making his participation a long shot despite his status.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/HappyPunch/status/1998045927823835578" />

### Ivanka Trump's Role and the Political Drama

Adding a family twist to the event, Ivanka Trump, who holds a blue belt in jiu-jitsu, is reportedly assisting Dana White with the planning. Her involvement adds a layer of personal investment and spectacle, blending the Trump family's public image with the high-octane world of UFC.

The event was initially planned to coincide with America's 250th birthday on July 4 but was rescheduled to June 14, Trump's actual birthday. According to The Daily Beast, Trump insists the date is a coincidence, but the alignment of his milestone birthday with a national celebration and a historic UFC event is hard to ignore. This convergence of personal and patriotic celebration is classic Trump — bold, theatrical, and unapologetically grandiose.

### A New Era of White House Celebrations?

This UFC fight night at the White House is more than a birthday party or a sporting event. It's a spectacle that blurs the lines between politics, entertainment, and sport, turning the seat of American power into a gladiatorial arena. The event promises to draw unprecedented attention, with tens of thousands on-site and hundreds of thousands more watching through massive screens.

The scale and ambition of the event suggest a new kind of political theater, one where the White House becomes a stage for larger-than-life moments that captivate the public imagination. Whether you love it or loathe it, this UFC extravaganza is set to leave a lasting mark on how America celebrates its milestones and its leaders.

If you thought you'd seen it all from the White House, think again. The cage is coming to the South Lawn, and the fight card promises to be legendary.

title: Nancy Mace Berates Airport Officers: 'F------ Incompetent'
headlines: Nancy Mace Caught in Profanity-Laced Meltdown
markdown_content:
*[Nancy Mace, 2017](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:NancyMace2017_(cropped).jpg). Photo courtesy of Jm817 under [CC BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/).*

Nancy Mace's airport meltdown at Charleston International Airport has become a cautionary tale of entitlement and political self-sabotage. What started as a simple mix-up over the color of her vehicle spiraled into a profanity-laced tirade against law enforcement and TSA staff, exposing the South Carolina congresswoman's volatile side just as she vies for the governor's mansion. An internal police report released in December 2025 reportedly reveals the full drama behind the scenes, painting a picture of frustration, miscommunication, and a public spectacle that could haunt Mace's campaign.

### A Minor Mix-Up Ignites a Firestorm

On the morning of October 30, 2025, Nancy Mace arrived at Charleston International Airport expecting a smooth, expedited escort to her gate. The plan was straightforward: airport police would meet her at the curb and accompany her through security. But a simple error set the stage for chaos. The supervisor responsible for coordinating the escort had reportedly been given incorrect information about Mace's vehicle color, expecting a "white" BMW when she actually arrived in a "gray/silver BMW," as reported by the New York Post. This miscommunication, the report notes, was unintentional and partly due to a rushed email and high staff turnover in Mace's office.

What might have been a minor inconvenience quickly escalated. Mace, reportedly on the phone and visibly agitated, expressed her frustration loudly, complaining that she "shouldn't be waiting" and that such delays "always happen," as reported by the New York Post. Her irritation was compounded by the fact that the officers were not on duty in the traditional sense, as the federal government was in a shutdown, leaving TSA staff unpaid at the time.

### Profanity and Public Outbursts

According to the police report, Mace's behavior at the Transportation Security Administration checkpoint was explosive. title: Medical License Suspended: Ohio Doctor Accused of Shocking Abuse
headlines: Medical License Suspended: Ohio Doctor Accused of Shocking Abuse
markdown_content:
Ohio's medical community and legal system are now at the center of a disturbing case that reads like a thriller — but it's all too real. Imagine a trusted surgeon, someone sworn to heal, accused of a crime so shocking it shakes the very foundation of medical ethics and personal autonomy. This is the story of Hassan-James Abbas, a 32-year-old surgical resident from Toledo, Ohio, whose alleged actions have led to a criminal indictment that has captured public attention and raised serious questions about abuse of power and consent.

### The Indictment That Shook Toledo

<InstagramEmbed url="https://www.instagram.com/reel/DR15VUGkvCE/" />

Hassan-James Abbas was reportedly indicted by a Lucas County Grand Jury on six felony charges, including abduction (a third-degree felony), tampering with evidence (third-degree), unlawful distribution of an abortion-inducing drug (fourth-degree), disrupting public services (fourth-degree), identity fraud (fifth-degree), and deception to obtain a dangerous drug (fifth-degree). The charges stem from allegations that Abbas allegedly forcibly administered abortion pills to his pregnant girlfriend without her consent, according to multiple reports. The case is not just about the act itself but the chilling details surrounding it — including the use of his estranged wife's identity to order the drugs and the alleged physical restraint of the woman while she was asleep.

### A Relationship Turned Criminal

The relationship between Abbas and the woman, who was also his patient, reportedly began in late 2024 after he separated from his estranged wife. When the woman revealed her pregnancy in December 2024, Abbas purportedly pressured her to have an abortion. When she refused, the situation escalated dramatically. According to the Ohio Medical Board's notice, Abbas allegedly ordered the abortion drugs mifepristone and misoprostol using his estranged wife's personal information without her knowledge or consent.

The most harrowing part of the allegations involves Abbas allegedly crushing the pills and attempting to force them into the woman's mouth while she was asleep. The woman reportedly woke up to find Abbas physically restraining her and forcing a crushed powder inside her bottom lip. She managed to escape and called 911, but Abbas allegedly took her phone and hung up the call, preventing her from getting immediate help.

### Medical License Suspended Amid Investigation

Following these allegations, the State Medical Board of Ohio took swift action. On Nov. 5, 2025, Abbas' medical license was summarily suspended, a move that temporarily bars him from practicing medicine pending a hearing. The board reportedly stated that the suspension was based on clear and convincing evidence that Abbas' continued practice posed an immediate and serious danger to the public.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/NCuffs1/status/1998258751430959185" />

The University of Toledo Medical Center, where Abbas was a surgical resident, reportedly placed him on administrative leave and emphasized their commitment to professional conduct and cooperation with the medical board's investigation.

### Legal Proceedings and What Lies Ahead

Abbas is reportedly scheduled to be arraigned on Dec. 19, 2025, in Lucas County Common Pleas Court. The arraignment will mark the formal start of his criminal proceedings, where he will face the six felony charges brought against him.

In addition to the criminal case, Abbas reportedly faces a medical board hearing scheduled for May 14-15, 2026. This hearing will determine whether his medical license will be permanently revoked or if other disciplinary actions will be taken. The hearing examiner will prepare a report with findings and recommendations for the board's final decision.

### The Broader Implications

This case is a stark reminder of the critical importance of consent and ethical conduct in medicine. It also highlights the potential dangers when personal relationships intersect with professional responsibilities. Abbas' alleged use of his estranged wife's identity to obtain abortion drugs adds a layer of identity fraud and deception that complicates the legal and ethical landscape.

For the woman involved, the trauma extends beyond the physical to a profound violation of trust and autonomy. Her courage in escaping the assault and seeking help underscores the resilience of survivors in the face of abuse.

### What You Should Know

As this case unfolds, it will undoubtedly continue to draw attention for its disturbing details and the serious questions it raises about medical ethics, legal accountability, and personal rights. You can expect updates as the legal process moves forward, shedding more light on this troubling story from Toledo.

If you or someone you know is facing a medical or legal crisis involving consent or abuse, it's important to seek help from trusted professionals and support organizations. Cases like this remind us all of the vital need to protect individual rights and uphold the highest standards of care and respect.

Stay tuned as this story develops — it's a sobering example of how power can be misused and why vigilance and justice are essential in safeguarding the vulnerable.

title: Stolen Skulls, Creepy Dolls: Harvard's Morgue Scandal
headlines: Stolen Skulls, Creepy Dolls: Harvard's Morgue Scandal
Harvard Cadavers Trafficked in Macabre Black Market: 'Dolls'
FBI: Dark Network Trafficked Stolen Human Remains
Harvard Medical's Stolen Corpses Found: 'Dolls'
markdown_content:
You might think you've seen it all when it comes to bizarre crimes, but the story of Katrina Maclean takes the macabre to a whole new level. Imagine a shop selling dolls and curiosities — only these aren't your typical trinkets. Instead, they're made from real human remains, stolen from one of the most prestigious medical institutions in the country. This unsettling tale of trafficking stolen body parts reveals a dark underworld where donated cadavers, meant for medical research, were diverted and sold for profit. It's a story that mixes shock, betrayal, and a chilling breach of trust.

### The Unfolding of a Gruesome Scheme

Katrina Maclean, 46, from Bradford, Massachusetts, pleaded guilty in federal court on Dec 8, 2025, to buying and selling human remains stolen from Harvard Medical School between 2018 and 2022, according to multiple reports. She operated a shop called Kat's Creepy Creations, which specialized in "oddities" and "creepy dolls" crafted from these illicit materials, as reported by the Otago Daily Times. The remains included skulls, dissected heads, and other body parts that had been donated for medical research and education before their scheduled cremations.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/janeway888/status/1669853516318269441" />

The stolen remains were allegedly trafficked across state lines, primarily between Massachusetts and Pennsylvania, creating a disturbing network of buyers and sellers. Maclean not only sold these morbid curiosities to customers but also transported them interstate, violating federal laws. The case exposes how donated bodies, entrusted to medical institutions for advancing science, were exploited for profit and morbid fascination.

### The Role of Harvard Medical School's Morgue Manager

Central to this grim operation was Cedric Lodge, the former morgue manager for the Anatomical Gifts Program at Harvard Medical School. Lodge was responsible for managing donated bodies intended for research and education. However, from 2018 to 2022, he allegedly stole organs and other body parts, which he then sold to various buyers, including Maclean. Lodge and his wife, Denise, reportedly transported stolen remains from Boston to their home in Goffstown, New Hampshire, where they arranged sales via phone and social media.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/janeway888/status/1671918088856510466" />

Maclean's involvement was not isolated. Other defendants, including Jeremy Pauley, Joshua Taylor, Andrew Ensanian, Matthew Lampi, and Angelo Pereyra, have also reportedly pleaded guilty to charges related to the stolen remains. Some have already been sentenced to prison terms, while others await sentencing. The FBI, the US Postal Inspection Service, and local police departments have been investigating this network, highlighting the extensive reach and seriousness of the crime.

### A Creepy Creations Shop Like No Other

Kat's Creepy Creations, Maclean's shop in Salem, Massachusetts, was more than just a store — it was a hub for the sale of these stolen human parts allegedly disguised as art and collectibles. The shop's Instagram bio described it as a place for "oddities," "creepy dolls," and "bone art," as reported by the Otago Daily Times, attracting a niche community fascinated by the unusual. Maclean allegedly purchased two dissected faces from Lodge for $600 each just before Halloween in 2020, underscoring the eerie nature of her business.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/bostonherald/status/1998514051412901939" />

Despite the grotesque nature of the items, Maclean's defense lawyers argued that she was a married woman and loving mother who was an active community member with no prior criminal record. They also claimed she was "part of a legal, nationwide oddities community that collects body parts," as reported by the Mirror — particularly in Salem, a town known for its fascination with the unusual. However, the law sees things differently when it comes to trafficking stolen human remains.

### Legal Consequences and Sentencing

Maclean faces a maximum sentence of 10 years in prison and a fine of up to $250,000 under federal law for the interstate transport of stolen human remains. However, prosecutors have recommended a more lenient sentence of 12 months as part of a plea deal. The final sentencing will be determined by the judge after considering federal sentencing guidelines and the specifics of the case.

The case serves as a stark reminder of the legal and ethical boundaries surrounding human remains. Donated bodies are meant to advance medical knowledge and education, not to be commodified or exploited. The betrayal of this trust has left many in the medical and legal communities shaken.

### What This Means for You

This unsettling case might make you think twice about the origins of some of the more unusual items you might encounter in curiosity shops or online marketplaces. It also highlights the importance of oversight and accountability in institutions that handle human remains. 

While the details are disturbing, the resolution of this case brings some measure of justice and hopefully deters others from engaging in similar crimes. It's a chilling chapter in the world of true crime that combines the grotesque with the deeply human — a reminder that even in the most respected institutions, dark secrets can lurk beneath the surface.

Charlie Kirk's widow, Erika, is revealing the heartbreaking reality behind the headlines, sharing how their 3-year-old daughter is grappling with the devastating loss of her father. ### A Tragic Day That Shattered a Family

Charlie Kirk, the conservative commentator and founder of Turning Point USA, was assassinated during a campus event at Utah Valley University in September 2025. The shocking attack unfolded as Kirk manned his signature "Prove Me Wrong" table on the first stop of his American Comeback Tour. The suspect, 22-year-old Tyler Robinson, was apprehended after an extensive manhunt and now faces multiple charges including aggravated murder, with prosecutors seeking the death penalty.

What followed was a moment that laid bare the collision of childhood faith and adult grief. ### Holding On to Love and Legacy

Erika's reflections on Charlie's life and death paint a picture of a man devoted to his family, faith, and country. She has spoken publicly about Charlie's courage and his desire to be remembered for his faith and love for his children. His death, she says, was a sacrifice made for his family and the nation, a message that resonates deeply as she navigates the aftermath.

Despite the overwhelming grief, Erika is determined to carry forward Charlie's mission and legacy. She has vowed that the tragedy will ignite a fire within her, a battle cry that will echo far beyond their home. For Erika, the days since the assassination have been a delicate dance between mourning and motherhood. Yet, she also finds solace in her faith and the belief that Charlie is building a home for them in heaven, a comforting image she shares with her children.

The family's story is a powerful reminder of how faith and innocence can offer light in the darkest times. title: How a Star Knew His Co-Star Was 'The One'
headlines: How a Star Knew His Co-Star Was 'The One'
Hollywood Stars' Romance Defy Norms
'Madam Secretary' Stars Share Rare Hollywood Love Story
Rare Love From 'Madam Secretary'
markdown_content:
*[Tim Daly, 1995](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Tim_Daly_(2077794579).jpg). Photo courtesy of Alan Light under [CC BY 2.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/2.0/).*

When Tim Daly met Téa Leoni on the set of the CBS political drama "Madam Secretary," it was supposed to be just another day at work. But for Daly, the moment was electric. He realized he was in love with Leoni just "four minutes" after their first meeting in 2014, as reported by the New York Post. More than a decade later, after years of quietly building a life together, the couple finally tied the knot in a private ceremony in New York in July 2025. Their journey from on-screen spouses to real-life partners is a rare Hollywood love story, one that unfolds with patience, respect, and a shared history that feels almost scripted by fate itself.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/nypost/status/1998448520974553395" />

### From Scripted Chemistry to Real Romance

Daly and Leoni first crossed paths as Henry and Elizabeth McCord, a married couple navigating the complex world of politics on "Madam Secretary." The show ran for six seasons, from 2014 to 2019, and their on-screen chemistry was undeniable. But behind the scenes, their connection was just beginning to take root. Daly has shared that the spark was instant, describing how he felt a magnetic pull toward Leoni mere minutes after meeting her on set and joking that he got "caught ... in her tractor beam," as reported by PEOPLE. It was a feeling so strong that it quickly became impossible to ignore.

Despite the immediate attraction, their romance unfolded with a rare kind of patience. Daly revealed that he proposed to Leoni nearly a decade ago, but she asked to "wait a minute," as reported by the New York Post. Years later, Leoni turned the tables and proposed to Daly, leading to their eventual marriage. This slow-burning love story defies the Hollywood norm of whirlwind romances and quick engagements, instead highlighting a deep respect and understanding that grew over time.

### A Shared Past and Unlikely Fate

Their story is sprinkled with moments that feel like destiny. Before "Madam Secretary," Daly and Leoni had reportedly crossed paths twice, though only briefly. Daly recalls seeing Leoni as a young woman at a fundraiser during his time on the show "Wings," but admitted he was too caught up "in the midst of all kinds of stuff" to pay her any attention, as reported by PEOPLE. Later, they met again through mutual connections — Leoni's then-husband, David Duchovny, was friends with Daly's cousin. These fleeting encounters set the stage for their eventual meeting on the "Madam Secretary" set, where their connection finally blossomed.

Adding to the sense of fate, Daly and Leoni attended the same boarding school in Vermont, the Putney School, though a decade apart. Daly shared that Leoni once told her roommate she was going to marry him someday, despite never having met him at the time, as reported by PEOPLE. This charming detail underscores the almost storybook quality of their relationship, as if their paths were destined to cross and intertwine.

### Keeping It Quiet in the Early Days

In the early seasons of "Madam Secretary," Daly and Leoni reportedly tried to keep their budding romance under wraps. Daly recalled how they attempted to stay low-key, but the crew quickly caught on. The teamsters often picked them up from each other's homes, and their mutual attraction was impossible to hide. Their "goo goo eyes" and undeniable chemistry became an open secret on set, even if they tried to maintain a professional front, as reported by the New York Post.

Their first public appearance as a couple came at the White House Correspondents' Dinner in Washington, D.C., in April 2015. This moment marked the beginning of their life together in the public eye, though they continued to nurture their relationship with a sense of privacy and intimacy that many Hollywood couples struggle to maintain.

### A Relationship Built on Trust and Openness

What sets Daly and Leoni apart is their commitment to honesty and vulnerability. Daly has spoken about how their conversations cover everything, including the difficult and painful moments. He credits this openness with creating a foundation of trust that has sustained their relationship through the years. Daly's reflections reveal a mature love, one that embraces challenges as opportunities for growth rather than obstacles.

This depth of connection is rare in an industry often marked by fleeting romances and public drama. Their story is a reminder that true intimacy requires patience, communication, and a willingness to be fully seen by another person.

### Hollywood's Rarest Love Story

Leoni and Daly's marriage places them among a select group of Hollywood couples who have successfully transitioned from on-screen partners to lifelong companions. Their journey echoes the romances of other beloved celebrity couples who found love through shared work and mutual respect, such as Ryan Reynolds and Blake Lively or Mila Kunis and Ashton Kutcher. Yet, Daly and Leoni's story feels uniquely grounded in a slow-burning, genuine connection that has stood the test of time.

Their union is a nostalgic nod to a Hollywood era when love stories unfolded with grace and patience, rather than in the glare of tabloid frenzy. It's a testament to the power of chemistry that begins on a scripted set but grows into something real and enduring.

### The Deepest, Most Fun Relationship

In recent interviews, Daly has reportedly described his marriage to Leoni as the deepest and most fun relationship he has ever had. After years of navigating the complexities of fame, family, and career, he finds profound relief in being able to be his whole self with Leoni. Their love story is not just about passion but about companionship, trust, and the joy of shared life experiences.

For fans of "Madam Secretary" and Hollywood romantics alike, their story offers a heartwarming reminder that sometimes the best love stories are the ones that take their time, growing quietly and beautifully until they are ready to bloom.

title: Grammy-Nominated Musician Killed by Driver With 100 Arrests
headlines: Grammy-Nominated Musician Killed by Driver With 100 Arrests
Driver With 100 Arrests Kills Grammy-Nominated Dog Walker
Rhode Island Driver With Drugs Killed Grammy-Nominated Musician
Driver With Long Criminal History Kills Beloved Musician
markdown_content:
*Shannon N. Godbout. Photo courtesy of Hopkinton Police Department.*

Roderick "Rory" Macleod was out for a simple morning walk with his dog on December 6, 2025, in Hope Valley, Rhode Island. What should have been a peaceful start to the day turned into a heartbreaking tragedy that stunned a community and the music world alike. The Grammy-nominated bassist, known for his soulful contributions to Roomful of Blues and his deep roots in folk and old-time music, was reportedly struck and killed by an SUV driven by a woman with a long criminal history. This sudden loss reminds us how fragile life can be, even in the quietest moments.

### A Life in Music and Community

Rory Macleod was more than just a musician; he was a beloved figure in Rhode Island's music scene. His career spanned decades, highlighted by a Grammy nomination in the 1980s for his work with Roomful of Blues, a band celebrated for its jump-blues and swing style. In 2012, Macleod and his bandmates were inducted into the Rhode Island Music Hall of Fame, cementing his legacy in the state's cultural history.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/wpri12/status/1998197153546596729" />

Beyond his professional achievements, Macleod was deeply involved in his community. Alongside his wife, Sandol Astrausky, he served as a director and teaching associate for Brown University's Old-Time String Band. The couple's shared passion for music extended into their personal lives, hosting annual summer music festivals on their 10-acre property in Hope Valley. Their story was one of love and collaboration, with Macleod learning guitar and banjo to play alongside his wife, blending personal and artistic harmony.

### The Tragic Morning

On that fateful Saturday morning, Macleod was walking his dog along Route 128 when Shannon Godbout, 41, reportedly lost control of her vehicle. Police reports reveal that Godbout veered out of her lane, striking multiple objects, including two telephone poles, before hitting Macleod on the shoulder of the eastbound lane, as reported by the New York Post. The impact was so severe that one telephone pole was split, leaving debris scattered at the scene.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/ReadTheLion/status/1998817010218652158" />

Emergency responders rushed Macleod to Rhode Island Hospital, but despite their efforts, he succumbed to his injuries. According to the New York Post, his dog survived the crash and ran home, a small mercy amid the tragedy.

### The Driver's Troubling History

The driver, Shannon Godbout, was arrested at the scene. Police say they found her in posession of "numerous illegal narcotics and packaging materials commonly associated with drug distribution," as reported by PEOPLE. This was not her first brush with the law — Godbout has reportedly been arrested more than 100 times, with 82 court warrants and 40 traffic citations to her name. Many of her previous offenses involved substance abuse, and she had been ordered to attend counseling multiple times, most recently in April 2025.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/KickRocks2025/status/1998163245182681330" />

Authorities charged Godbout with driving so as to endanger resulting in death and possession of narcotics with intent to distribute, marking her third or subsequent offense. The Hopkinton Police Department is reportedly working closely with the Rhode Island Attorney General's Office to present her as a probation violator, which could lead to additional charges.

### Remembering Rory Macleod

Friends and fellow musicians remember Macleod not only for his musical talent but also for his warm personality. Doug James, a longtime friend and fellow musician, described Macleod as "always upbeat and cheerful," as reported by The Independent, someone who made every musical collaboration feel effortless and enjoyable. His ability to play multiple instruments with ease and his dedication to his craft left a lasting impression on those who knew him.

<YoutubeEmbed url="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O_MDhbr6guA" />

The band Roomful of Blues expressed their condolences, writing on Facebook, "Roomful of Blues would like to extend our deepest condolences to Rory Macleod’s family, friends and all of his fans. We would like to acknowledge his diverse musical contributions as well as being a wonderful and gentle soul. There are no words for such an immense loss. RIP, dear friend," as reported by PEOPLE.

### A Moment to Reflect

This tragic event serves as a stark reminder of how quickly life can change. A man who spent his life bringing joy through music was taken in a moment of unforeseen violence. For those who knew Rory Macleod, his legacy will live on through his music, his teaching, and the memories of a gentle soul who touched many lives.

As you reflect on this story, consider the fragility of everyday moments and the importance of community and compassion. Rory Macleod's life was a testament to the power of music and connection, and his sudden passing leaves a void that will be felt far beyond the streets of Hope Valley.

If you're a fan of music or simply someone who values the stories behind the headlines, Rory's story is a poignant reminder to cherish the people and moments that make life meaningful.

__References:__ [Grammy-Nominated Musician Rory Macleod Killed While Dog Walking](https://people.com/grammy-nominated-musician-rory-macleod-hit-and-killed-driver-in-possesion-drugs-11864908) | [Grammy-nominated musician Roderick MacLeod killed by driver with more than 100 arrests | New York Post](https://nypost.com/2025/12/09/us-news/grammy-nominated-musician-roderick-macleod-killed-by-driver-with-more-than-100-arrests/) | [Driver who killed Grammy-nominated musician walking his dogs had been arrested over 100 times](https://www.the-independent.com/news/world/americas/crime/rhode-island-100-arrests-crash-killed-roderick-macleod-b2881033.html)

title: Marcus Lemonis Slashes $10 Million Off NYC Townhouse Price
headlines: Marcus Lemonis Slashes $10 Million Off NYC Townhouse Price
Inside Marcus Lemonis' $24.5M Upper East Side Mansion
Billionaire Lists NYC Townhouse for $24.5M
'The Profit' Star's $10M Price Slash Stuns NYC Buyers
markdown_content:
*[Marcus Lemonis, 2019](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Marcus_Lemonis_Image.jpg). Photo courtesy of Sandro Miller under [CC BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/).*

Billionaire businessman and TV star Marcus Lemonis just made a jaw-dropping move in New York's luxury real estate scene. He and his wife, Roberta "Bobbi" Fenchel, reportedly slashed the asking price of their sprawling Upper East Side townhouse by a staggering $10 million. Once listed at $35 million, the five-story, five-bedroom mansion is now on the market for $24.5 million. This dramatic price cut is more than just a sale tactic. It's a vivid snapshot of the shifting economic realities gripping New York City's high-end property market as of December 2025.

Lemonis, best known for his hit show "The Profit," and his business empire, reportedly bought the townhouse in 2021 for $18 million. Since then, he has poured millions into transforming the home into a masterpiece of luxury and history. Yet, despite the lavish renovations and prime location, the market has forced a rethink. The price drop tells a story of big money meeting cold market conditions, revealing that even high-profile investors are feeling the squeeze.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/nypost/status/1998482749091397936" />

### A Historic Home With a Glamorous Past

The townhouse at 34 E. 62nd St. is no ordinary property. It stands on the site of a historic mansion once owned by Vincent Astor, a wealthy socialite and spy whose family legacy includes the iconic St. Regis Hotel. During World War II, Astor turned the home into a secret clubhouse for a spy group known as "The Room," where elite figures like Kermit Roosevelt gathered to discuss state secrets. This rich history adds a layer of intrigue and prestige to the property that few homes can match.

The current home, built from the ground up after a devastating gas explosion in 2006, boasts a limestone facade, bowed French windows, and a striking slate mansard roof. Inside, the house opens to a grand foyer with herringbone oak floors and a sculptural glass and wood staircase. The main floor features a chef's kitchen with custom tile floors, a wood-burning fireplace, and French doors that lead to an ivy-covered garden with a fire pit. Upstairs, the parlor level offers a formal dining room with arched French windows, a butler's pantry with a custom bar, and a living room with coffered ceilings and another fireplace.

### Lavish Living Spread Over 5 Floors

The townhouse's upper floors are equally impressive. The third floor currently serves as two large guest suites, each with spa-like bathrooms and walk-in closets. The fourth floor houses two more bedrooms with ensuite baths, a gas fireplace, and a large walk-through closet with custom millwork. The entire fifth floor is dedicated to the master suite, featuring a horizontal fireplace, media center, grey oak floors, a massive walk-through closet, and a spa-like bathroom.

Outside, the rooftop terrace is a showstopper, complete with a gas fire pit and ample space for dining and entertaining. The basement level includes a media and family room with built-in cabinetry, a glassed-in office or gym, and a second laundry room. The entire home is smart-wired with radiant floors throughout, blending modern technology with classic elegance.

### Why the Price Cut?

Despite the home's undeniable allure and Lemonis's investment, the luxury market in New York City is facing headwinds. According to Lemonis, the city's real estate market is evolving under new leadership and economic pressures. He acknowledges that buyers now demand true perceived value before making a move. The arrival of new mayor Adrian Mamdani and broader economic concerns, including mortgage rates and unemployment, have created a more competitive environment.

Lemonis, who recently announced his retirement as CEO of Camping World Holdings, but remains a special advisor and executive chair of Bed Bath & Beyond, is not abandoning New York. Instead, he is seeking a smaller residence, reportedly admitting the townhouse is simply too large for his current lifestyle. His decision to reduce the asking price reflects a pragmatic approach to the market's realities.

### A Market in Flux

New York's luxury real estate has long been a symbol of wealth and stability. But the current climate is testing even the most seasoned investors. Lemonis's price cut underscores a broader trend: high-end properties are no longer guaranteed quick sales at sky-high prices. Buyers are cautious, and sellers must adapt.

Lemonis remains bullish on the city's long-term prospects. He repotedly believes that Mayor Mamdani's influence is limited and that the city's economic strength and cultural vibrancy will endure. He points to bustling streets, packed restaurants, and the city's status as a global hub for finance, art, theater, and shopping as reasons to stay optimistic.

### What This Means for You

If you've ever dreamed of owning a slice of New York luxury, Lemonis's price cut might be a sign that the market is opening up. But it also serves as a reminder that even billionaires must navigate the unpredictable tides of real estate. The glamorous life of a TV star and business mogul comes with its own set of challenges, and the city that never sleeps is no exception.

Whether you're a real estate enthusiast, a fan of "The Profit," or simply curious about the intersection of fame and fortune, this story offers a fascinating glimpse into how high stakes and high prices collide in one of the world's most coveted markets.

The Upper East Side townhouse at 34 E. 62nd St. remains a stunning symbol of history, luxury, and ambition. Now, with a new price tag, it's waiting for the next chapter — and the next lucky buyer ready to step into a world where past secrets meet present-day glamour.

__References:__ [Exclusive | Marcus Lemonis cuts the price of his NYC townhouse by $10M](https://nypost.com/2025/12/09/real-estate/marcus-lemonis-cuts-the-price-of-his-nyc-townhouse-by-10m/) | [Marcus Lemonis House: Complete Guide to The Profit Star's Amazing Homes](https://thisolderhouse.com/marcus-lemonis-house/)

title: Meghan Markle Sends Handwritten Note After Dad's Amputation
headlines: Meghan Markle Sends Handwritten Note After Dad's Amputation
Meghan Markle Calls Hospitals to Find Her Father
Meghan Markle Writes Father After Leg Amputation
Meghan Markle's Dad Pleas: 'I Want to See My Grandkids'
markdown_content:
*[Official calls and evening reception for TRH The Duke and Duchess of Sussex, 2018](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Meghan,_Duchess_of_Sussex.jpg). Photo courtesy of the Office of the Governor-General under [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).*

Meghan Markle is making a heartfelt attempt to reconnect with her estranged father, Thomas Markle, after a shocking family crisis that has captured public attention. The 81-year-old former lighting director recently underwent an emergency leg amputation in the Philippines, a life-altering event that has reopened old wounds and stirred deep emotions. Meghan, 44, is said to be trying to reach out once again, hoping to bridge the painful gap that has kept them apart for years. But the question remains: has her message actually reached Thomas, or is this another chapter in a fraught family saga marked by miscommunication and distance?

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/AbanteNews/status/1997758009322389607" />

### A Family Rift Meets a Medical Emergency

The rift between Meghan and Thomas Markle has been public and painful, stretching back to just before her 2018 wedding to Prince Harry. The fallout reportedly began when Meghan learned that Thomas had staged paparazzi photos and leaked private information to the press, an alleged betrayal that led to their estrangement. Since then, contact has been sporadic at best, with Thomas repeatedly expressing confusion and frustration over Meghan's silence. Now, with Thomas facing a dire medical emergency, the stakes have never been higher.

Thomas's leg amputation was reportedly the result of a severe blood clot that cut off circulation, turning his foot black and necessitating urgent surgery. According to PEOPLE, the procedure, described by his son Thomas Markle Jr. as "life or death," took place in a hospital in Cebu, Philippines, where Thomas has been recovering. This medical crisis has reportedly prompted Meghan to try to reach out, involving a handwritten letter and calls to local hospitals in an effort to locate him and ensure her message is delivered.

### The Elusive Connection

Despite Meghan's reported efforts, uncertainty clouds whether her outreach has truly connected with Thomas. Sources close to Meghan have indicated that while progress has been made in identifying the hospital, actual contact has not yet been established, as reported by Page Six. Meghan's team has apparently been calling hospitals to find Thomas and arrange for the letter to be hand-delivered, but the process has been complicated by the fact that Thomas is reportedly not in possession of his phone and Meghan does not have a current working number for him.

Adding to the uncertainty, Thomas himself was reportedly "confused" over reports that Meghan had reached out, as reported by Page Six. He told the Daily Mail that he had not received any messages from his daughter and remains hopeful for reconciliation. Thomas has openly pleaded to see Meghan and his grandchildren before it is "too late," emphasizing that he has never stopped loving her and wants to meet her husband and children.

### A Letter That Carries More Than Words

The letter Meghan reportedly hopes to send is more than just a note; it is a symbol of a fragile attempt at healing a fractured family. The emotional weight behind this gesture is immense. For Meghan, who has publicly spoken about the pain of losing her father, this moment represents a chance to close a painful chapter. For Thomas, it is a desperate hope to reconnect with the daughter he has missed for years and to meet the grandchildren he has never seen.

Thomas Markle's health struggles have been ongoing, with previous reports of strokes and heart attacks. title: Prince Harry Slams Royal Life: More Drama Than Downton Abbey
headlines: Prince Harry Slams Royal Life: More Drama Than Downton Abbey

markdown_content:
*[Prince Harry and Meghan Markle, The Duke & Duchess of Sussex, visit District Six Museum in Cape Town, South Africa, 2019](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Prince_Harry_and_Meghan_Markle_visit_District_Six_Museum_02.jpg). Photo courtesy of eNCA on YouTube under [CC BY 3.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/).*

Prince Harry knows drama. Not the scripted kind you binge-watch on TV, but the real, high-stakes, palace-level drama that unfolds behind the gilded walls of Buckingham Palace. At a recent British-American Business Council event in Los Angeles, the Duke of Sussex delivered a zinger that perfectly captured the chaotic, often turbulent life of a royal. He reportedly joked that while many compare growing up in the royal family to the beloved British series "Downton Abbey," his experience had more "drama, intrigue, elaborate dinners [and] marriages to Americans," as reported by Page Six — a sharp, humorous nod to the very real intensity and complexity of royal life.

<TwitterEmbed url="https://x.com/Telegraph/status/1997370505288986888" />

### A Royal Roast With a Bite

The joke landed with a mix of laughter and knowing nods. "Downton Abbey" is a cultural touchstone, a show that dramatizes the lives of aristocrats and their servants in early 20th-century England, filled with secrets, scandals, and social upheaval. Harry's quip was not just a playful comparison; it was a pointed commentary on the real-life drama that has engulfed his family, especially since he and Meghan Markle stepped back from their royal duties and relocated to California. The "marriages to Americans" line was a cheeky reference to his own union with Meghan, which has been a lightning rod for media frenzy and palace tension.

By framing his royal upbringing in terms familiar to an American audience, Harry cleverly bridged the gap between the old-world aristocracy and the modern celebrity culture he now inhabits. His humor masked a deeper truth: life inside the royal family is far from the polished, fairy-tale image often portrayed. It is a world rife with intrigue, power struggles, and personal conflicts that rival any scripted drama.

### The Fallout of Royal Departure

Harry's relationship with his father, King Charles III, and his brother, Prince William, reportedly remains strained. Since their departure from official royal roles, the Sussexes have been vocal about the challenges and pressures they faced within the monarchy. Harry's memoir, "Spare," and various interviews have peeled back the curtain on family tensions, media scrutiny, and the emotional toll of royal life. His joke at the luncheon was a subtle yet unmistakable reminder of these ongoing rifts.

Despite a brief meeting with King Charles earlier this year, the icy relationship with Prince William reportedly persists. The public has watched this family drama unfold with a mix of fascination and sympathy, as Harry and Meghan carve out a new life far from the traditional royal spotlight. Their absence from family Christmas celebrations since their wedding year underscores the distance that has grown between them and the rest of the royal household.

### A New World, A New Identity

At the same event, Harry reflected on his evolving identity as a British expatriate living in the United States. He shared that being British is less about geography and more about values and what one stands for, as reported by Page Six. Celebrating the Fourth of July was a novel experience for him, symbolizing a break from his royal lineage and a step into a new chapter of independence — even humorously acknowledging his "great, great, great, great, great, great-grandfather" in the process.

His lighthearted remarks about welcoming fellow Brits to the 2026 World Cup, contingent on their ability to navigate US immigration policies, added another layer of humor and cultural commentary, as reported by Vanity Fair. This playful jab at American customs and immigration enforcement highlighted Harry's unique position straddling two worlds — the old-world monarchy and the fast-paced, diverse culture of modern America.

### The Glamour and the Grit

Harry's speech was more than just a series of jokes. It was a window into the glamorous yet gritty reality of royal life. The elaborate dinners and social rituals he referenced are steeped in tradition, but they also come with intense public scrutiny and personal sacrifice. The "drama and intrigue" he mentioned are not just plot devices for a TV show; they are the lived experiences of a family constantly under the microscope.

For an American audience, the comparison to "Downton Abbey" makes the royal world more relatable, while the added "marriages to Americans" line brings the story home. It is a reminder that behind the crowns and tiaras are real people navigating complex relationships, public expectations, and personal ambitions.

### What's Next for the Sussexes?

As Harry and Meghan continue to build their lives in California, their story remains a captivating blend of royal tradition and modern celebrity. Harry's ability to use humor to address serious family issues shows a savvy understanding of his public role. His remarks at the British-American Business Council luncheon were a masterclass in balancing wit with candor, offering a glimpse of the man behind the headlines.

The royal family's saga is far from over. With ongoing tensions, public reconciliations, and the ever-watchful eyes of the media, the drama inside the palace walls continues to unfold. Harry's "Downton Abbey" comparison is a perfect metaphor for a family caught between history and the present, tradition and change, all under the relentless glare of the spotlight.

title: $30M Fraud Scheme: FBI Hunts Fake Heiress Abroad
